login.heroNote: Sign in to continue managing your profile and team financial reports.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use the email and password you provided during registration.
login.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in will appear once `VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` is set in frontend and `Google:ClientId` in backend.
login.googleNoToken: Google did not return a sign-in token.
login.googleTurnstileRequired: Complete the Turnstile check before signing in with Google.
login.googleNotConfiguredShort: Google OAuth client ID is not configured.
login.googleInitializing: Google Sign-In is still initializing. Try again.

register.heroTitle: Create a profile for your fundraising team
register.heroNote: Create an account so your team can quickly start working with reports and volunteer profiles.
register.title: Registration
register.subtitle: Fill in the basic details. Your email will become your permanent login.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, uppercase and lowercase letter, a digit and a special character.

forgotPassword.heroNote: Enter your email and we'll send instructions to recover your account.
forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address you used during registration.
forgotPassword.fallbackMessage: If the email exists, instructions have been sent.
forgotPassword.tokenLink: Have a token? Go directly to setting a new password

resetPassword.heroNote: Set a new password for your account and return to sign in without extra steps.
resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitleWithLink: Email and token have been pre-filled from the email link.
resetPassword.subtitleManual: If you opened this page without the email, paste the email and token manually.
resetPassword.redirecting: Redirecting to sign in in {{count}} s.
resetPassword.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from the email
resetPassword.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, uppercase and lowercase letter, a digit and a special character.

featureItems: One account for sign-in, profile and future reporting.
Simple forms with no extra steps and Ukrainian-language hints.
Quick access recovery if you forget your password.
supportFacts: Adapts to your system theme automatically.
shell.featuresHeading: What you'll be able to do

dashboard.step2: Create your first campaign in the "Campaigns" section

profile.heroDescription: This page contains data used across the authenticated interface. Email remains the sign-in source, while name, phone and photo can be edited without re-registration.
profile.updateSuccessDescription: Changes saved and already applied to your profile.
profile.successDesc: Changes saved and already applied to your profile.
profile.title: {{name}} account
profile.subtitle: This page contains data used across the authenticated interface. Email remains the sign-in source, while name, phone and photo can be edited without re-registration.

onboarding.subtitle: Create your first organization to start raising funds and tracking expenses.
onboarding.organizeTeamDesc: Invite volunteers, assign roles, track campaigns.
onboarding.transparentReportsDesc: Upload receipts, automatically compare with bank statements.

create.title: New organization
create.description: Create an organization to start raising funds for volunteering.
create.slugHint: Latin URL identifier. Auto-generated from the name, but can be changed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Edit the organization profile and contacts
settings.cropDescription: Select a square area for the organization logo

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Manage your organization's campaigns
campaigns.emptyDescription: Create your first campaign to start accepting donations.

team.title: Team
team.leaveConfirmDesc: You will lose access to this organization. You'll need a new invitation to return.
team.removeConfirmDesc: This member will no longer have access to the organization.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.description: Create a public link or send an email invitation.
invite.linkMissingToken: Server did not return invitation token

page.invalidDesc: This invitation no longer works — it may have expired or been cancelled.
page.acceptedDesc: You've joined "{{name}}". Go to the dashboard to get started.
page.title: Invitation to "{{name}}"

receipts.title: Receipts
receipts.subtitle: Upload receipts for automatic reporting
receipts.comingSoonDesc: The receipts module will be available after campaign and team setup is complete.

validation.namePattern: Only letters, spaces, apostrophes and hyphens
validation.slugPattern: Only lowercase letters, digits and hyphens

appShell.title: Volunteer portal
appShell.subtitle: Update your profile, photo, and stay ready to upload receipts without an extra admin step.
